title: Quantum Levitation Is Real!
description: How quantum physics allows objects to float in mid-air. #science #physics #shorts
voiceover_script: Imagine a world where objects can float in mid-air forever. [sfx: chime] This isn't magic, it is quantum levitation! By cooling a superconductor with liquid nitrogen, [sfx: freeze] we lock it in a magnetic field. Instantly, it floats! [sfx: whoosh] Follow for more mind-blowing science!
